texto: Although the villagers rose with the sun to work the fields, attend to the animals, bake their bread, and begin their long list of chores, for me, Leya Truelong, this was a day like no other. Today, Wren River was touched by the fantastic. Desiccate by Bonnie Ferrante
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bonnie Ferrante: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a tempo. O trecho “Although the villagers rose with the sun to work the fields, attend to the animals, bake their br…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, fantasy, fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.
